hourly_summary: 本小时共收录 105 条：AI 40 条、策略交易 10 条、加密货币 25 条、世界事件 20 条、财经 10 条。重点关注：【FINANCE】会议纪要显示，美联储官员预计，如果通胀保持在高位，美联储将加息；【FINANCE】美联储加息？当交易者看到加息即将到来时；【FINANCE】日本大型银行利润创历史新高，但分析师警告称，随着风险加剧，增长可能放缓。

items.title: Fed officials see rate hike ahead if inflation stays elevated, minutes show
items.summary: A majority of officials anticipated that interest rate increases would be necessary if the Iran war continued to aggravate inflation.
items.title_zh: 会议纪要显示，美联储官员预计，如果通胀保持在高位，美联储将加息
items.summary_zh: 大多数官员预计，如果伊朗战争继续加剧通胀，则有必要加息。

items.title: Fed to hike? When traders see a rate increase coming
items.summary: Traders on prediction market platforms see increasing odds that an interest rate hike from the central bank comes by July 2027.
items.title_zh: 美联储加息？当交易者看到加息即将到来时
items.summary_zh: 预测市场平台上的交易员认为，央行在 2027 年 7 月之前加息的可能性越来越大。

items.title: Japan’s megabanks post record profits, but analysts warn growth may slow as risks mount
items.summary: Japan's largest lenders may face some challenges to keep profit levels at record highs, amid higher credit costs and current geopolitical risks
items.title_zh: 日本大型银行利润创历史新高，但分析师警告称，随着风险加剧，增长可能放缓
items.summary_zh: 在信贷成本上升和当前地缘政治风险的情况下，日本最大的银行可能面临将利润水平保持在历史高位的一些挑战

items.title: Kraken parent Payward secures preliminary VARA approval for Dubai expansion
items.summary: Kraken parent Payward secured preliminary VARA approval in Dubai, opening a pathway to expand regulated crypto services in the UAE.
items.title_zh: Kraken 母公司 Payward 获得 VARA 迪拜扩张初步批准
items.summary_zh: Kraken 母公司 Payward 在迪拜获得了 VARA 的初步批准，为在阿联酋扩大受监管的加密服务开辟了道路。

items.title: Ebola vaccine could take nine months as death toll rises further, WHO warns
items.summary: In its latest update, the World Health Organization says there have now been 139 suspected deaths and 600 cases.
items.title_zh: 世卫组织警告称，随着死亡人数进一步上升，埃博拉疫苗可能需要九个月的时间
items.summary_zh: 世界卫生组织在最新更新中表示，目前已有 139 例疑似死亡病例和 600 例病例。

items.title: Live markets: Bitcoin's flat action continues as SpaceX IPO, Nvidia earnings capture news cycle
items.summary: Hyperliquid's HYPE is the outlier in crypto, rising 16.5% over the past 24 hours to a new record high.
items.title_zh: 实时市场：随着 SpaceX 首次公开募股、英伟达财报成为新闻周期，比特币继续保持平淡走势
items.summary_zh: Hyperliquid 的 HYPE 是加密货币领域的异常值，在过去 24 小时内上涨 16.5%，创下新高。

items.title: Bitcoin's long-term holder supply approaches record high, breaking multi-year downtrend
items.summary: Long-term holder supply has surged by more than 2 million coins to 16.3 million BTC during the current bear market.
items.title_zh: 比特币长期持有者供应量接近历史新高，打破多年下降趋势
items.summary_zh: 在当前的熊市期间，长期持有者的供应量激增了超过 200 万个比特币，达到 1630 万个比特币。

items.title: Foundation raises $6.4 million to expand from bitcoin hardware wallets into AI agent authorization
items.summary: The firm also announced the general availability of its flagship Passport Prime device and expanded access to its KeyOS developer platform.
items.title_zh: 基金会筹集 640 万美元，从比特币硬件钱包扩展到 AI 代理授权
items.summary_zh: 该公司还宣布其旗舰 Passport Prime 设备全面上市，并扩大了对其 KeyOS 开发者平台的访问范围。

items.title: ‘Rally slows into resistance’: Bitcoin stalls below $78,000 as ETF outflows and long liquidations deepen recovery doubts
items.summary: Bitcoin trades near $77,500 as ETF outflows extend to four days, long liquidations mount, and analysts flag $80,000 as the next key test.
items.title_zh: “反弹放缓至阻力位”：随着 ETF 流出和多头清算加深对复苏的疑虑，比特币跌破 78,000 美元
items.summary_zh: 随着 ETF 资金流出持续四天，多头清算增加，分析师将 80,000 美元视为下一个关键考验，比特币交易价格接近 77,500 美元。

items.title: How business operations teams use Codex
items.summary: See how business operations teams can use Codex to create initiative briefs, strategy updates, leadership decision packets, progress updates, and more from real work inputs.
items.title_zh: 业务运营团队如何使用 Codex
items.summary_zh: 了解业务运营团队如何使用 Codex 根据实际工作输入创建计划简报、战略更新、领导决策包、进度更新等。

items.title: Alibaba reveals more powerful Zhenwu AI chip, new LLM
items.summary: Alibaba announced updates to its AI offerings, including a more powerful chip and a new large language model.
items.title_zh: 阿里巴巴展示更强大的真武AI芯片、新法学硕士
items.summary_zh: 阿里巴巴宣布对其人工智能产品进行更新，包括更强大的芯片和新的大型语言模型。

items.title: Standard Chartered to cut over 15% of corporate functions roles as it targets higher returns
items.summary: Standard Chartered will trim corporate functions roles and target a more than 20% increase in income per employee by 2028 as it seeks stronger returns.
items.title_zh: 渣打银行将削减超过 15% 的企业职能职位，以实现更高回报
items.summary_zh: 渣打银行将削减企业职能，并计划到 2028 年将每位员工的收入增加 20% 以上，以寻求更强劲的回报。

items.title: Nvidia earnings call drama: Will Jensen Huang talk 'Trump' and China chips after Xi summit?
items.summary: Both Nvidia's earnings and its commentary on its financial report are expected to be big tests for U.S. equities.
items.title_zh: 英伟达财报电话大戏：习近平峰会后黄仁勋会谈论“特朗普”和中国芯片吗？
items.summary_zh: 英伟达的盈利及其对财务报告的评论预计将成为美国股市的重大考验。

items.title: Gonorrhoea and syphilis hit record levels in Europe
items.summary: STIs have surged thanks to record cases and gaps in testing and prevention, a health agency reports.
items.title_zh: 欧洲淋病和梅毒创历史新高
items.summary_zh: 卫生机构报告称，由于创纪录的病例以及检测和预防方面的差距，性传播感染激增。

items.title: Nvidia's latest record earnings fail to impress investors
items.summary: The chip giant reported more stellar results but its shares fell after-hours as investors wonder if it can keep up its pace of growth amid greater competition.
items.title_zh: 英伟达最新创纪录的盈利未能给投资者留下深刻印象
items.summary_zh: 这家芯片巨头公布了更为出色的业绩，但其股价盘后下跌，因为投资者怀疑该公司能否在更激烈的竞争中保持增长速度。

items.title: The Hard-Line Military Fraternity Running Iran
items.summary: Decision making in Iran is guided by a small group of men associated with the Islamic Revolutionary Guards Corps.
items.title_zh: 强硬的军事兄弟会管理伊朗
items.summary_zh: 伊朗的决策是由与伊斯兰革命卫队有联系的一小群人指导的。

items.title: In Berlin, Cars Are a Culture War Flashpoint
items.summary: With municipal elections approaching, conservatives and progressives are sparring over congestion in the city center and how to fix it.
items.title_zh: 在柏林，汽车是文化战争的导火索
items.summary_zh: 随着市政选举的临近，保守派和进步派正在就市中心的拥堵问题以及如何解决这一问题展开争论。

items.title: How Iran Gained Leverage in the War
items.summary: Outmatched militarily, Iran used “triangular coercion” by attacking Gulf states and closing the Strait of Hormuz. It points to a long-term U.S. vulnerability.
items.title_zh: 伊朗如何在战争中获得影响力
items.summary_zh: 在军事上处于劣势的伊朗利用“三角胁迫”攻击海湾国家并关闭霍尔木兹海峡。它指出了美国的长期脆弱性。

items.title: Stablecoins retain the edge over tokenized money market funds, JPMorgan says
items.summary: The bank said tokenized money market funds account for only about 5% of the broader stablecoin universe despite offering yield.
items.title_zh: 摩根大通表示，稳定币相对于代币化货币市场基金仍具有优势
items.summary_zh: 该银行表示，尽管提供了收益，但代币化货币市场基金仅占更广泛的稳定币领域的 5% 左右。

items.title: How Ramp engineers accelerate code review with Codex

items.title_zh: Ramp 工程师如何使用 Codex 加速代码审查
items.summary_zh: Ramp 工程师如何使用 Codex 和 GPT-5.5 来审查代码并发布改进，使他们能够在几分钟而不是几小时内获得实质性反馈。

items.title: Introducing OpenAI for Singapore
items.summary: OpenAI for Singapore launches a multi-year AI partnership to expand deployment, build local talent, and support businesses and public services with AI.
items.title_zh: 为新加坡推出 OpenAI
items.summary_zh: OpenAI for Singapore 启动了一项多年的人工智能合作伙伴关系，以扩大部署、培养本地人才，并通过人工智能支持企业和公共服务。

items.title: Advancing content provenance for a safer, more transparent AI ecosystem
items.summary: OpenAI advances AI content provenance with Content Credentials, SynthID, and a verification tool to help people identify and trust AI-generated media.
items.title_zh: 推进内容来源，打造更安全、更透明的人工智能生态系统
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 通过内容凭证、SynthID 和验证工具推进 AI 内容来源，帮助人们识别和信任 AI 生成的媒体。

items.title: Technology usually creates jobs for young, skilled workers. Will AI do the same?
items.summary: A new study of the postwar U.S. shows which kinds of workers historically filled new tech-enabled jobs.
items.title_zh: 技术通常会为年轻的技术工人创造就业机会。人工智能也会这么做吗？
items.summary_zh: 一项针对战后美国的新研究显示了历史上哪些类型的工人担任了新技术支持的工作。

items.title: Games people — and machines — play: Untangling strategic reasoning to advance AI
items.summary: Assistant Professor Gabriele Farina mines the foundations of decision-making in complex multi-agent scenarios.
items.title_zh: 人和机器玩的游戏：理清战略推理以推进人工智能
items.summary_zh: 助理教授 Gabriele Farina 挖掘复杂多智能体场景中决策的基础。

items.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: Internet Computer drops 1.6%, leading index lower
items.summary: Hedera (HBAR), down 1.3% from Wednesday, joined Internet Computer (ICP) as an underperformer.

items.summary_zh: Hedera (HBAR) 较周三下跌 1.3%，与 Internet Computer (ICP) 一样表现不佳。

items.summary: Your day-ahead look for May 21, 2026

items.summary_zh: 2026 年 5 月 21 日天气预报

items.title: The $6 billion expiration countdown: Traders pile into $82,000 bitcoin calls ahead of May 29 expiry
items.summary: Deribit’s bitcoin open interest has overtaken BlackRock’s IBIT as traders brace for a showdown between $75K max pain and $80K call positioning.
items.title_zh: 60 亿美元到期倒计时：交易者在 5 月 29 日到期前买入 82,000 美元的比特币看涨期权
items.summary_zh: Deribit 的比特币未平仓合约已经超过 BlackRock 的 IBIT，交易者准备迎接 7.5 万美元的最大痛苦和 8 万美元的看涨期权头寸之间的摊牌。

items.title: HYPE leads crypto rebound as traders position for volatility breakout
items.summary: Bitcoin and ether stabilized as derivatives activity rebounded, HYPE rose for a fifth straight day and options traders positioned for a breakout.
items.title_zh: 随着交易者为波动性突破做好准备，炒作引领加密货币反弹
items.summary_zh: 随着衍生品活动反弹，比特币和以太币企稳，HYPE 连续第五天上涨，期权交易者准备突破。

items.title: Fantasy Top to shut down, says trading card game model was ‘never built’ for crypto
items.summary: Its founder said that financialized crypto trading card games attract speculators rather than players.
items.title_zh: Fantasy Top 将关闭，称集换式卡牌游戏模型“从未为加密货币构建”
items.summary_zh: 其创始人表示，金融化的加密交易卡牌游戏吸引的是投机者而不是玩家。

items.title: An OpenAI model has disproved a central conjecture in discrete geometry
items.summary: An OpenAI model solved the 80-year-old unit distance problem, disproving a major conjecture in discrete geometry and marking a milestone in AI-driven mathematics.
items.title_zh: OpenAI 模型反驳了离散几何的中心猜想
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 模型解决了 80 年历史的单位距离问题，反驳了离散几何中的一个重大猜想，标志着人工智能驱动数学的里程碑。

items.title: The next phase of OpenAI’s Education for Countries
items.summary: OpenAI advances Education for Countries, expanding AI adoption in schools with new partnerships, teacher training, and tools to improve global learning outcomes.
items.title_zh: OpenAI 国家教育的下一阶段
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 推进国家教育，通过新的合作伙伴关系、教师培训和工具扩大人工智能在学校的采用，以改善全球学习成果。

items.title_zh: OlmoEarth v1.1：更高效的地球观测模型系列

items.title: How AI Mode is changing the way people search in the U.S.

items.summary_zh: 发布一年后，看看 AI 模式的用户如何从关键字转向自然语言查询。

items.title: New ways to create and get things done in Google Workspace
items.summary: Announcing new voice capabilities in Gmail, Docs and Keep, a new design tool called Google Pics and updates to AI Inbox.
items.title_zh: 在 Google Workspace 中创建和完成工作的新方法
items.summary_zh: 宣布 Gmail、Docs 和 Keep 中的新语音功能、名为 Google Pics 的新设计工具以及 AI Inbox 的更新。

items.title: Gemini 3.5: frontier intelligence with action
items.summary: At Google I/O we released Gemini 3.5, our latest series of models combining frontier intelligence with action.

items.summary_zh: 在 Google I/O 大会上，我们发布了 Gemini 3.5，这是我们将前沿智能与行动相结合的最新模型系列。

items.title: Building AI models that understand chemical principles
items.summary: Connor Coley works at the interface of chemistry and machine learning, to discover and design new drug compounds.
items.title_zh: 构建理解化学原理的人工智能模型
items.summary_zh: Connor Coley 致力于化学和机器学习的结合，发现和设计新的药物化合物。

items.title: Beacon Biosignals is mapping the brain during sleep
items.summary: Founded by Jake Donoghue PhD ’19 and former MIT researcher Jarrett Revels, the company is creating an AI-driven platform to help diagnose and treat disease.
items.title_zh: Beacon Biosignals 正在绘制睡眠期间的大脑图
items.summary_zh: 该公司由 Jake Donoghue 博士 '19 和前麻省理工学院研究员 Jarrett Revels 创立，正在创建一个人工智能驱动的平台来帮助诊断和治疗疾病。

items.title: Retail investors get direct access to SpaceX IPO through major brokerage platforms
items.summary: SpaceX's blockbuster public offering is giving everyday traders access that has traditionally been reserved for Wall Street's biggest clients.
items.title_zh: 散户投资者可通过各大券商平台直接参与SpaceX IPO
items.summary_zh: SpaceX 的轰动一时的公开募股为日常交易者提供了传统上为华尔街最大客户保留的机会。

items.title: OpenAI takes the lead in AI IPO horse race: 'Getting to public markets first is very important'
items.summary: It comes after reports that the AI giant and ChatGPT owner is set to file confidentially for an IPO as soon as this week.
items.title_zh: OpenAI在AI IPO赛马中领先：“首先进入公开市场非常重要”
items.summary_zh: 此前有报道称，这家人工智能巨头和 ChatGPT 所有者最快将于本周秘密申请 IPO。

items.title: Fintech firm Mercury hits $5.2 billion valuation after funding round, up 49% in 14 months
items.summary: Mercury has emerged as one of a select group of fintech firms, like Ramp and Stripe, that continued to thrive after the collapse of pandemic-era valuations.
items.title_zh: 金融科技公司 Mercury 在本轮融资后估值达到 52 亿美元，14 个月内上涨 49%
items.summary_zh: Mercury 已成为 Ramp 和 Stripe 等精选金融科技公司之一，这些公司在大流行时代估值崩溃后继续蓬勃发展。

items.title: China confirms order for 200 Boeing planes, calls aviation key area for U.S. cooperation
items.summary: China has agreed to buy 200 Boeing jets, its first major order in nearly a decade, U.S. President Donald Trump said last week.
items.title_zh: 中国确认订购200架波音飞机，称航空业是中美合作的关键领域
items.summary_zh: 美国总统唐纳德·特朗普上周表示，中国已同意购买 200 架波音飞机，这是近十年来的第一笔重大订单。

items.title: Iran steps up claim to control Strait of Hormuz
items.summary: Iran publishes a map claiming "armed forces oversight" across more than 22,000 sq km of the waterway.
items.title_zh: 伊朗加强声称控制霍尔木兹海峡
items.summary_zh: 伊朗发布了一张地图，声称“武装部队监督”了超过22,000平方公里的水道。

items.title: China says US should stop 'threats' against Cuba after ex-leader charged
items.summary: It comes after the US charged Cuba's ex-leader with murder, the latest move putting pressure on the regime.
items.title_zh: 前领导人被指控后，中国称美国应停止对古巴的“威胁”
items.summary_zh: 此前，美国指控古巴前领导人谋杀，这是向古巴政权施加压力的最新举措。

items.title: Air France and Airbus found guilty of manslaughter over 2009 plane crash
items.summary: The companies were found guilty by a French court over an air disaster which killed 228 people.
items.title_zh: 法航和空客因2009年飞机失事被判过失杀人罪
items.summary_zh: 法国一家法院因造成 228 人死亡的空难而判定这两家公司有罪。

items.title: Gaza flotilla activists set for deportation from Israel as backlash over treatment grows
items.summary: Activists have begun to leave Israel after international outrage over their treatment in detention.
items.title_zh: 由于对治疗的强烈反对，加沙船队活动人士准备被以色列驱逐出境
items.summary_zh: 在国际社会对其拘留待遇感到愤怒后，活动人士已开始离开以色列。

items.title: Dozens of vehicles burnt as Mali jihadists enforce blockade ahead of Eid holiday
items.summary: The blockade has led to shortages of fuel and food ahead of next week's Muslim holiday of Eid.
items.title_zh: 马里圣战分子在开斋节假期前实施封锁，数十辆汽车被烧毁
items.summary_zh: 在下周的穆斯林节日开斋节之前，封锁导致燃料和食品短缺。

items.title: DR Congo cancels World Cup training camp over Ebola outbreak
items.summary: The outbreak, caused by a rare Ebola species, is thought to have caused 139 deaths so far.
items.title_zh: 刚果民主共和国因埃博拉疫情取消世界杯训练营
items.summary_zh: 此次疫情由一种罕见的埃博拉病毒引起，据信迄今为止已造成 139 人死亡。

items.title: Trump says he will speak to Taiwan's president in break from protocol
items.summary: It comes as the US weighs whether to proceed with a $14bn arms sales to Taiwan, which China claims as its own.
items.title_zh: 特朗普称他将违反礼节与台湾总统通话
items.summary_zh: 在此之际，美国正在考虑是否继续向中国宣称拥有主权的台湾出售价值 140 亿美元的武器。

items.title: Fire Destroys Sacred Buddhist Hall in Japan that Housed ‘Eternal Flame’
items.summary: The flame, which spiritual leaders say has been continuously lit for more than 1,200 years, was salvaged after the blaze and moved to a different site.
items.title_zh: 火灾摧毁了日本神圣的佛教大厅，里面藏着“永恒的火焰”
items.summary_zh: 精神领袖称圣火已连续点燃了 1200 多年，火灾发生后被打捞并移至其他地点。

items.title: Mira Nair Finds a New Audience as Mother of Zohran Mamdani
items.summary: “I feel like we have given him to the world,” the filmmaker said in a conversation with The New York Times. Her next movie is about one of India’s greatest artists.
items.title_zh: 米拉·奈尔 (Mira Nair) 饰演佐兰·马姆达尼 (Zohran Mamdani) 的母亲，找到了新观众
items.summary_zh: “我觉得我们已经把他奉献给了世界，”这位电影制片人在接受《纽约时报》采访时说道。她的下一部电影是关于印度最伟大的艺术家之一的。

items.title: Timmy the Whale Got Stranded Off the German Coast. Then Things Got Weird.
items.summary: A humpback that became stuck in the Baltic seemed to unite a nation in hope. Rescue efforts followed, and then finger-pointing.
items.title_zh: 鲸鱼蒂米在德国海岸搁浅。然后事情变得很奇怪。
items.summary_zh: 一只被困在波罗的海的座头鲸似乎让整个国家团结在了希望之中。随后展开救援，然后相互指责。

items.title: Days After Hosting Trump, Xi Serves Up Tea and Smiles to Putin
items.summary: During a state visit, the Chinese and Russian leaders cast themselves as a stabilizing force in a world thrown into tumult by Washington.
items.title_zh: 接待特朗普几天后，习近平向普京敬茶并微笑
items.summary_zh: 在国事访问期间，中国和俄罗斯领导人将自己视为华盛顿陷入动荡的世界中的稳定力量。

items.title: Cuba Says the Trump Administration Is Not Negotiating in Good Faith
items.summary: Cuba’s ambassador to the United Nations said in an interview that Havana wanted to talk but the Trump administration was creating pretexts for military action.
items.title_zh: 古巴称特朗普政府没有诚意进行谈判
items.summary_zh: 古巴驻联合国大使在接受采访时表示，哈瓦那希望进行对话，但特朗普政府正在为军事行动制造借口。

items.title: Ebola Crisis Sparks Debate Over Global Health Double Standards
items.summary: To some Africans, the claim that the continent’s largest health agency had already bungled its response scratched a familiar wound.
items.title_zh: 埃博拉危机引发关于全球卫生双重标准的争论
items.summary_zh: 对于一些非洲人来说，非洲大陆最大的卫生机构已经应对不力的说法触动了他们熟悉的伤口。

items.title: The French Civil Servant Accused of Drugging More Than 100 Women
items.summary: For years, prosecutors have accused Christian Nègre, once a senior official, of slipping diuretics into women’s drinks. Despite admitting to some accusations in an interview with a French daily, he is yet to stand trial.
items.title_zh: 法国公务员被控对100多名女性下药
items.summary_zh: 多年来，检察官一直指控曾经担任高级官员的克里斯蒂安·内格雷(Christian Nègre)在女性饮料中添加利尿剂。尽管他在接受法国日报采访时承认了一些指控，但尚未接受审判。

items.title: Peer-to-peer trading startup Variational raises $50 million for real-world perps in funding round led by Dragonfly
items.summary: The company is initially offering perpetual futures on real-world assets including oil, silver, copper and gold.
items.title_zh: 点对点交易初创公司 Variational 在 Dragonfly 领投的一轮融资中为现实世界的员工筹集了 5000 万美元
items.summary_zh: 该公司最初提供石油、白银、铜和黄金等现实世界资产的永续期货。

items.title: Blockchain.com files with SEC for U.S. IPO
items.summary: The crypto financial services firm submitted a draft S-1 to the SEC as it explores a public listing amid renewed momentum in digital asset markets.
items.title_zh: Blockchain.com 向 SEC 提交美国 IPO 申请
items.summary_zh: 这家加密货币金融服务公司向 SEC 提交了一份 S-1 草案，在数字资产市场新的势头下探索公开上市。

items.title: A crypto whale has made a $224,000 bet that XRP's price stays perfectly flat through June
items.summary: The trader collected about $224,500 in premiums and will keep the full amount if XRP remains close to $1.40.
items.title_zh: 加密鲸鱼下了 224,000 美元的赌注，认为 XRP 的价格在 6 月份之前将保持完全平稳
items.summary_zh: 该交易员收取了约 224,500 美元的溢价，如果 XRP 保持在 1.40 美元附近，他将保留全额溢价。

items.title: Blockchain.com confidentially files for US IPO as crypto firms continue public market push
items.summary: Blockchain.com confidentially filed with the SEC for an IPO, joining Circle, Gemini, and BitGo in crypto's sustained public markets push.
items.title_zh: 随着加密货币公司继续推动公开市场，Blockchain.com 秘密申请美国 IPO
items.summary_zh: Blockchain.com 秘密向 SEC 申请 IPO，加入 Circle、Gemini 和 BitGo 的行列，持续推动加密货币公开市场的发展。

items.title: Cosmos co-founder’s new multilateral clearing startup Cycles raises $6.4 million
items.summary: The round, led by Blockchange Ventures, with support from Coinbase Ventures, among others, brings Cycle's total funding to $8.7 million.
items.title_zh: Cosmos 联合创始人新成立的多边清算初创公司 Cycles 融资 640 万美元
items.summary_zh: 本轮融资由 Blockchange Ventures 领投，Coinbase Ventures 等公司提供支持，使 Cycle 的总融资额达到 870 万美元。

items.title: Missouri AG sues CoinFlip, calls crypto ATMs ‘getaway cars for fraud’
items.summary: Missouri sued CoinFlip, alleging its cryptocurrency ATMs were used in widespread consumer fraud schemes and charged excessive fees.
items.title_zh: 密苏里州 AG 起诉 CoinFlip，称加密货币 ATM 为“欺诈逃逸车”
items.summary_zh: 密苏里州起诉 CoinFlip，指控其加密货币 ATM 机被用于广泛的消费者欺诈计划，并收取过高的费用。

items.title: Wife of Sandbox co-founder Sebastien Borget targeted in kidnapping attempt at home in France: report
items.summary: The wife of Sandbox co-founder Sebastien Borget was targeted in a kidnapping attempt as France logs over 41 crypto kidnappings in 2026.
items.title_zh: Sandbox 联合创始人塞巴斯蒂安·博尔杰 (Sebastien Borget) 的妻子在法国家中遭绑架
items.summary_zh: 2026 年，法国发生了超过 41 起加密货币绑架事件，Sandbox 联合创始人 Sebastien Borget 的妻子成为绑架企图的目标。

items.title: US sanctions Sinaloa Cartel-linked cash-to-crypto laundering network tied to fentanyl trafficking
items.summary: OFAC sanctioned a Sinaloa Cartel-linked cash-to-crypto network accused of laundering fentanyl proceeds through cryptocurrency transfers.
items.title_zh: 美国制裁与芬太尼贩运有关的锡那罗亚卡特尔相关的现金加密洗钱网络
items.summary_zh: OFAC 制裁了一个与锡那罗亚卡特尔相关的现金加密网络，该网络被指控通过加密货币转移洗钱芬太尼收益。

items.title: Syndicate Labs to wind down operations after five years, citing rollup market slump
items.summary: Syndicate Labs said that the $330,000 exploit last month is unrelated to the decision to wind down operations.
items.title_zh: Syndicate Labs 将在五年后结束业务，理由是 Rollup 市场低迷
items.summary_zh: Syndicate Labs 表示，上个月的 33 万美元漏洞与停止运营的决定无关。

items.title: OpenAI and Dell partner to bring Codex to hybrid and on-premise enterprise environments
items.summary: OpenAI and Dell partner to bring Codex to hybrid and on-premise environments, helping enterprises deploy AI coding agents securely across data and workflows.
items.title_zh: OpenAI 和戴尔合作将 Codex 引入混合和本地企业环境
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 和戴尔合作将 Codex 引入混合和本地环境，帮助企业跨数据和工作流程安全地部署 AI 编码代理。

items.title: OpenAI and Malta partner to bring ChatGPT Plus to all citizens
items.summary: OpenAI and Malta partner to expand AI access, offering ChatGPT Plus and training to help citizens build practical AI skills and use AI responsibly.
items.title_zh: OpenAI 和马耳他合作为所有公民带来 ChatGPT Plus
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 和马耳他合作扩大人工智能的使用范围，提供 ChatGPT Plus 和培训，帮助公民培养实用的人工智能技能并负责任地使用人工智能。

items.title: How sales teams use Codex
items.summary: See how sales teams can use Codex to create pipeline briefs, meeting prep packets, forecast reviews, account plans, and stalled-deal diagnoses from real work inputs.
items.title_zh: 销售团队如何使用 Codex
items.summary_zh: 了解销售团队如何使用 Codex 根据实际工作输入创建管道简报、会议准备包、预测审查、客户计划和停滞交易诊断。

items.title: How data science teams use Codex
items.summary: See how data science teams can use Codex to build root-cause briefs, impact readouts, KPI memos, scoped analyses, and dashboard specs from real work inputs.
items.title_zh: 数据科学团队如何使用 Codex
items.summary_zh: 了解数据科学团队如何使用 Codex 根据实际工作输入构建根本原因简介、影响读数、KPI 备忘录、范围分析和仪表板规范。

items.title: Introducing the Ettin Reranker Family
items.title_zh: Ettin Reranker 系列简介

items.title: Fine-Tuning NVIDIA Cosmos Predict 2.5 with LoRA/DoRA for Robot Video Generation
items.title_zh: 使用 LoRA/DoRA 微调 NVIDIA Cosmos Predict 2.5 以生成机器人视频

items.title: PaddleOCR 3.5: Running OCR and Document Parsing Tasks with a Transformers Backend
items.title_zh: PaddleOCR 3.5：使用 Transformers 后端运行 OCR 和文档解析任务

items.title: The Open Agent Leaderboard
items.title_zh: 开放代理排行榜

items.title: Granite Embedding Multilingual R2: Open Apache 2.0 Multilingual Embeddings with 32K Context — Best Sub-100M Retrieval Quality
items.title_zh: Granite Embedding Multilingual R2：具有 32K 上下文的 Open Apache 2.0 多语言嵌入 — 最佳低于 100M 的检索质量

items.title: Unlocking asynchronicity in continuous batching
items.title_zh: 解锁连续批处理中的异步性

items.title: vLLM V0 to V1: Correctness Before Corrections in RL
items.title_zh: vLLM V0 到 V1：RL 修正前的正确性

items.title: Adding Benchmaxxer Repellant to the Open ASR Leaderboard
items.title_zh: 将 Benchmaxxer Repellant 添加到 Open ASR 排行榜

items.title: We’re announcing new community investments in Missouri.
items.summary: We’re helping build the state’s next-generation workforce and investing in energy programs.
items.title_zh: 我们宣布在密苏里州进行新的社区投资。
items.summary_zh: 我们正在帮助培养该州的下一代劳动力并投资能源项目。

items.title: 100 things we announced at I/O 2026
items.summary: This year at Google I/O 2026, we announced Gemini Omni, Google Antigravity, Universal Cart and so much more. Here are the highlights.
items.title_zh: 我们在 I/O 2026 上宣布的 100 件事
items.summary_zh: 今年，在 Google I/O 2026 上，我们发布了 Gemini Omni、Google Antigravity、Universal Cart 等等。以下是亮点。

items.title: A new experiment brings better group meetings to Google Beam
items.summary: See and hear your colleagues in true-to-life size and sound, making hybrid meetings feel more inclusive and connected.
items.title_zh: 一项新实验为 Google Beam 带来了更好的小组会议
items.summary_zh: 以逼真的尺寸和声音看到和听到同事的​​声音，使混合会议感觉更具包容性和联系。

items.title: I/O 2026
items.summary: At Google I/O 2026, we shared how we’re making AI more helpful for everyone. See everything we announced.
items.summary_zh: 在 Google I/O 2026 上，我们分享了如何让人工智能为每个人提供更多帮助。查看我们宣布的所有内容。

items.title: I/O 2026: Welcome to the agentic Gemini era
items.summary: The latest from Google I/O: See how we’re helping you get more done with Gemini.
items.title_zh: I/O 2026：欢迎来到充满活力的双子座时代
items.summary_zh: Google I/O 最新动态：了解我们如何帮助您利用 Gemini 完成更多工作。

items.title: A new era for AI Search
items.summary: We shared the next step in our journey to bring together the best of a search engine with the best of AI.
items.title_zh: 人工智能搜索的新时代
items.summary_zh: 我们分享了将搜索引擎的最佳功能与人工智能的最佳功能结合在一起的下一步。

items.title: Everything new in our Google AI subscriptions, fresh from I/O 2026
items.summary: Introducing a $100 AI Ultra plan — plus, new features and benefits for Google AI Plus, Pro and Ultra subscribers.
items.title_zh: 我们的 Google AI 订阅中的所有新内容均来自 I/O 2026
items.summary_zh: 推出 100 美元的 AI Ultra 计划，此外，还为 Google AI Plus、Pro 和 Ultra 订阅者提供新功能和福利。

items.title: Justin Solomon appointed associate dean of engineering education
items.summary: MIT faculty member in electrical engineering and computer science to focus on innovation in engineering education and new pedagogical approaches.
items.title_zh: 贾斯汀·所罗门被任命为工程教育副院长
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院电气工程和计算机科学教员，专注于工程教育和新教学方法的创新。

items.title: Two from MIT named 2026 Knight-Hennessy Scholars
items.summary: The prestigious fellowship funds graduate studies at Stanford University.
items.title_zh: 麻省理工学院的两名学生被评为 2026 年 Knight-Hennessy 学者
items.summary_zh: 这项享有盛誉的奖学金资助斯坦福大学的研究生学习。

items.title: Q&A: Expanding MIT’s global reach through Universal Learning
items.summary: Dimitris Bertsimas and Megan Mitchell discuss the motivation behind Universal Learning, and what sets the new MIT Open Learning educational initiative apart.
items.title_zh: 问答：通过通用学习扩大麻省理工学院的全球影响力
items.summary_zh: Dimitris Bertsimas 和 Megan Mitchell 讨论了通用学习背后的动机，以及麻省理工学院新的开放学习教育计划的与众不同之处。

items.title: Universal AI is “a pathway to AI fluency that’s accessible and approachable to anyone, anywhere”
items.summary: New AI education program from MIT Open Learning debuts with AI-powered personalization and a free introductory course for learners everywhere.
items.title_zh: 通用人工智能是“一条通向人工智能流畅之路，任何人、任何地方都可以使用、平易近人”
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院开放学习的新人工智能教育计划首次推出，为世界各地的学习者提供人工智能驱动的个性化和免费入门课程。

items.title: Study: Firms often use automation to control certain workers’ wages
items.summary: MIT economists found US companies tend to target employees earning a “wage premium,” which increases inequality but not necessarily productivity.
items.title_zh: 研究：公司经常使用自动化来控制某些工人的工资
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院的经济学家发现，美国公司倾向于以赚取“工资溢价”的员工为目标，这会增加不平等，但不一定会提高生产率。

items.title: Improving understanding with language
items.summary: MIT senior Olivia Honeycutt investigates how the ways we communicate can shape our views of the world.
items.title_zh: 通过语言提高理解力
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院大四学生奥利维亚·霍尼卡特研究了我们的沟通方式如何塑造我们的世界观。
